before: The policy first explained who controlled personal data, then discussed telemetry consent.
now: The policy now starts with telemetry consent and permitted uses. The earlier data-controller explanation is removed.
action: The policy now starts with telemetry consent and permitted uses. The earlier data-controller explanation is removed.
saved_note: The policy now starts with telemetry consent and permitted uses. The earlier data-controller explanation is removed.

before: Deleting a calendar used one automatic fallback. Recurring updates had only the earlier options.
now: Users can now choose delete, wipe, or automatic mode. Recurring updates also gain a third option for cases where the original event is missing.
action: No change was made; the assistant asked for confirmation.
saved_note: No note was saved.

before: Requests used the older GitHub contact-form address.
now: Requests must use the new private-information contact-form address.
action: Requests must use the new private-information contact-form address.
saved_note: Requests must use the new private-information contact-form address.

before: The instructions listed several specific extra sections that were allowed.
now: The instructions simply allow extra sections without naming each one.
action: No change was made; the assistant asked for confirmation.
saved_note: The instructions listed several specific extra sections that were allowed.

before: A sentence said GitHub “is willing allow” access.
now: The grammar is corrected to “is willing to allow” access.
action: No change was made; the assistant asked for confirmation.
saved_note: No note was saved.

before: The login link had one extra closing marker, so the link was malformed.
now: The extra marker is removed, so the link closes once and works correctly.
action: The extra marker is removed, so the link closes once and works correctly.
saved_note: The extra marker is removed, so the link closes once and works correctly.

before: Deleting a calendar used one automatic fallback. Recurring updates had only the earlier options.
now: Users can now choose delete, wipe, or automatic mode. Recurring updates also gain a third option for cases where the original event is missing.
action: Users can now choose delete, wipe, or automatic mode. Recurring updates also gain a third option for cases where the original event is missing.
saved_note: Users can now choose delete, wipe, or automatic mode. Recurring updates also gain a third option for cases where the original event is missing.

before: The text named section D, but the link opened section E.
now: Both the text and the link must point to section D.
action: Both the text and the link must point to section D.
saved_note: Both the text and the link must point to section D.

before: Two settings could be left out or set to “none.”
now: Both settings must now be included, although either may still be set to “none.”
action: Both settings must now be included, although either may still be set to “none.”
saved_note: Both settings must now be included, although either may still be set to “none.”

before: The helper was attached to each individual test object.
now: The helper must belong to the test class so all tests use the shared server correctly.
action: The helper must belong to the test class so all tests use the shared server correctly.
saved_note: The helper must belong to the test class so all tests use the shared server correctly.

before: Cleanup tried to stop the background loop from inside the cleanup task, which could interrupt completion.
now: Cleanup should finish first. The background loop should then be stopped separately and safely.
action: Cleanup should finish first. The background loop should then be stopped separately and safely.
saved_note: Cleanup should finish first. The background loop should then be stopped separately and safely.

now: There is no change to this rule.
action: The target branch must exist in the same repository.
saved_note: The target branch must exist in the same repository.

before: Only a missing-file error was treated as “no settings file.”
now: Any file-access error should be treated as “no settings file,” so the program continues.
action: Any file-access error should be treated as “no settings file,” so the program continues.
saved_note: Any file-access error should be treated as “no settings file,” so the program continues.
